title: kumlienia cooleyae
intro: Kumlienia cooleyae, also known as Cooley's kumlienia, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is a shrubby perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, and is known for its medicinal properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, sore throats, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. Kumlienia cooleyae can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its health benefits, which include reducing inflammation, soothing coughs, and promoting overall well-being.
